texts.label: text
texts.orig: The rates above include statutory taxes, levies and service charges. In the event the Government of Kenya adjusts or institutes a new tax regime during the duration of this agreement, Mara Engai Lodge reserves the right to adjust the rates in this agreement accordingly. We will endeavor to maintain these rates and advise clients as soon as possible of any such changes. All vouchers issued and bookings made by you shall be subject to the terms and conditions contained in this document (or amendments that we may communicate to you in writing) unless otherwise agreed in writing in advance by BOTH parties.
